name: Aria
speech_patterns: Apologizes even when nothing went wrong
quirks: Brings triple the normal amount of mana potions 'just in case'
Blames herself for any death even if it was clearly not her fault
Reviews every dungeon run afterward to find her 'mistakes'
example_phrases: sorry sorry that was too slow, should've pre-cast the heal, my bad
is everyone okay? i have mana but what if the next pull is bigger and i oom and—
that death was 100% my fault, i was watching the tank and didn't see the DPS standing in fire
i brought 47 potions. is that enough? it feels like not enough
hopefully this goes well... last time i healed this dungeon someone died and i still think about it
